title: Quran, Sura 109: Al-Kafirun
description: Sura 109 (Al-Kafirun: The Disbelievers) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 109 (Al-Kafirun: The Disbelievers) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Say: O disbelievers, I do not worship what you worship. Nor are you worshippers of what I worship. For you is your religion, and for me is my religion.
